title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Bikanervala Advisory Limited in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
